name: computer-use-win
description: Control Windows desktop apps from Codex through Computer Use for Windows powered by Okno.

interface.shortDescription: Control Windows apps from Codex through Okno
interface.longDescription: Computer Use for Windows is a Codex-native Windows desktop control plugin powered by the Okno engine. It provides the public operator surface `list_apps`, `get_app_state`, `click`, `press_key`, `set_value`, `type_text`, `scroll`, `perform_secondary_action`, and `drag` for state-first GUI work without exposing the low-level Windows engine tools as the main product UX.
defaultPrompt: Use Computer Use for Windows to inspect the target Windows app.
Start with list_apps and get_app_state, then use click, press_key, set_value, type_text, scroll, perform_secondary_action, or drag only after fresh state proof.
